title: Pilot: improve portfolio summary clarity with explicit gain/loss legend

evidence: observed ux friction in manual review
benchmark comparison: legend is present in competing tools

Quality rewrite note: execution plan now includes concrete implementation and validation sequence. Quality rewrite note: execution plan now includes concrete implementation and validation sequence.
expected_benefit: Higher clarity in portfolio interpretation and reduced confusion-driven support questions, measurable via feedback and reduced clarification actions. title: Pilot v2: improve portfolio insight card clarity with benchmark-backed labels
problem: Insight card labels are ambiguous for first-time users, causing misinterpretation of trend signals and confidence score meaning. Quality rewrite note: problem statement expanded to clarify consequence, urgency, and verification boundary.
evidence: manual UX review: ambiguous labels
benchmark signal: competing tools label confidence dimension explicitly
proposed_change: Add explicit context labels and short explanatory subtitle in portfolio insight card; scope limited to one user-facing component. Quality rewrite note: execution plan now includes concrete implementation and validation sequence.
expected_benefit: Reduce interpretation friction, improve trust in insight card, and lower clarification interactions in user testing. Quality rewrite note: expected outcomes are framed for reviewer decision and measurable closure.
rollback_plan: Revert insight card label changes and restore previous text.
